sentences.english: I sell handmade jewelry online as a side hustle.
It doesn't make much but it's fun.
I tutor kids in math on weekends for extra money.
sentences.korean: 주말에 추가 수입을 위해 아이들에게 수학을 가르쳐요.

sentences.english: It's rewarding and I earn enough to cover my rent.
I drive for a ride-sharing app after work, but it's exhausting doing two jobs.
sentences.korean: 퇴근 후 차량 공유 앱 운전을 해요. 하지만 두 개의 일을 하는 건 지치는 일이에요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
